name: melange
description: melange — builds apk packages from declarative YAML pipelines (Chainguard); emits an SBOM per package.
title: melange

llmHints.on_match: melange build observed. The sbom attestor captures the SPDX SBOM melange generates for each apk.

positiveSetup: Invoke cilock with argv starting "melange build"
negativeSetup: Invoke cilock with unrelated argv (e.g. `echo unrelated`)
